title: DFPD Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 02 Joint Director, Deputy Director Posts
description: The Department of Food and Public Distribution (DFPD) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Joint Director and Deputy Director Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed any degree can apply for the DFPD Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection proce...
